market_positioning.short_term_view_1_5d: Broad risk remains under pressure, so favor selective shorts and narrow commodity-energy continuation rather than broad dip buying.
market_positioning.swing_view: Swing setups should stay defensive until breadth and bond-credit behavior stabilize, with oversold metals and rates-sensitive assets kept as secondary bounce watchlists.
supporting_signals: Breadth was 4 advancers versus 44 decliners with average 1 day return near negative 1.9 percent
Breadth volume and range ratios above 1.3 show expanding downside participation
Credit and duration both fell, with TLT down hardest and HYG JNK also negative
Sector ETF 3 day continuation is concentrated in DBC XLE USO and agriculture funds
Industry momentum leadership is concentrated in oil gas and coal rather than broad cyclicals
conflicting_signals: Commodity and energy ETFs still have positive 3 day follow through
Precious metals and some defensive assets are already deeply stretched on the downside
Technology appears on the ETF mean reversion list, which could support a tactical bounce if selling slows

evidence: SPY EFA and EEM are all in ETF momentum weakness with negative 1 day and 3 day returns
Breadth is overwhelmingly negative with only 4 advancers
Downside participation is expanding on elevated volume and range
allocation_buckets.risk_or_invalidation: Reduce this short bias if breadth improves materially and major index ETFs stop making lower 3 day lows.

evidence: XLE and USO are in the positive 3 day momentum list
Oil and gas industries dominate industry momentum leadership
XLE held roughly flat on the day while the broad tape sold off
allocation_buckets.risk_or_invalidation: Exit if XLE loses its recent relative strength and energy stops outperforming broad equities over 1 to 3 days.

evidence: DBC and PDBC show positive 1 day 3 day and 5 day returns
DBA remains positive over 3 day and 5 day windows
Commodity leadership aligns with coal and energy strength at the industry level
allocation_buckets.risk_or_invalidation: Cut exposure if commodity ETFs lose positive 3 day momentum or leadership narrows to a single contract only.

evidence: HYG JNK and EMB all posted negative 1 day and 3 day returns
Credit weakness confirms risk appetite deterioration rather than a clean safety rotation
Bond volatility and range expansion remain elevated
allocation_buckets.risk_or_invalidation: Cover if high yield and EM credit stabilize for multiple sessions and stop underperforming core bonds.

evidence: Silver and gold rank at the top of industry mean reversion candidates
Weekly losses are extreme in precious metals and related mining groups
This setup is secondary because broad market breadth is still weak
allocation_buckets.risk_or_invalidation: Only activate on clear stabilization; persistent downside in metals or renewed broad liquidation invalidates the bounce thesis.
